metadata.dc:title: Sweriges rikes lag 1734 - Digital Remediation
metadata.dc:creator: Sachini Nissanka
Erik Lundahl
metadata.dc:subject: Swedish legal history
Digitisation
Archival methodology
Multimodality
metadata.dc:description: A digital remediation, transcription, and archival capture of the "Stöld" (Thievery) chapter from the 1734 Swedish legal code.
metadata.dc:rights: Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC-BY 4.0)
